title: Hal Mckinney
compiled_truth: Hal Mckinney is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-09-19 to 2002-02-06), Hal Mckinney sent 13 and received 461 emails, totalling 474 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kam Keiser](people/kam-keiser) (9), [Shirley Mcdowell](people/shirley-mcdowell) (3), [Jeffrey Gossett](people/jeffrey-gossett) (2), [Phillip Love](people/phillip-love) (2), [O'Neal Winfree](people/o-neal-winfree) (2).
